guest.lead: TrainDart is built for players who want a better way to track their performance. From daily practice routines to online matches — tools designed to help you analyze data and refine your throw.

seo.title: TrainDart — Darts training and statistics tool
seo.description: TrainDart provides an easy way to track your darts practice, analyze your statistics, and play online matches. A reliable tool for every darts player.

features.sectionLead: Features designed for purposeful practice and consistent gameplay.

stats.title: Detailed statistics
stats.desc: Track your average and checkout percentages to see objective data on how your game is evolving.

training.title: Structured practice
training.desc: Choose practice modes that fit your needs. Focused work on doubles triples and segments leads to better results.

online.title: Online matches
online.desc: A simple way to play against others. Compete in your own time, anywhere you have your setup.

data.title: Match analysis
data.desc: Get a clear summary after every match. It helps you spot mistakes faster and improve your consistency.

tournaments.title: Tournament system with API integration*
tournaments.desc: Organize tournaments and synchronize results in real-time. Our API allows seamless data integration for third-party platforms, ideal for professional ranking systems and digital scoreboards.*

aiReports.title: AI-generated match reports
aiReports.desc: AI analyzes tournament performance to generate a professional, journalistic-style recap, highlighting key throws and turning points.

tournamentBlock.title: Run brackets like a real event
tournamentBlock.lead: Build knockout or round-robin tournaments, generate fixtures automatically, and track every player’s path through the draw — from first round to final.

points.live: Live progression as results come in

reportsBlock.title: Share every match like a highlight post
reportsBlock.lead: After each game, TrainDart turns your real stats into a ready-to-post story — formatted for Facebook, Instagram, or your club blog.

fb.title: Match report: Club night 501
fb.body: A tight best-of-five decided on the last leg. Strong first 9, clinical doubles when it mattered.

blog.title: How the bracket flipped in round 2
blog.excerpt: An AI-written recap of momentum shifts, 180s, and the finish that sent one player to the final.

closing.title: Join the community
closing.lead: Try the tool that makes practice and matches more organized.
